business.geography_hint: Warsaw / Fort Wayne area, US (Parkview Sports Medicine, Leo HS references)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Parents/athletes are deciding whether to trust a coaching organization with a player's development — the proof is founder credentials (pro player, HS head coach), Master Coaches, and a wall of college-commitment alumni. Sells defined coaching expertise, so trust wins on the first rung of the ladder.

goal.one_action: register for a tryout / clinic / program (or subscribe to the email list secondarily)

structure.archetype_note: Program-hub sports club: many program pages fan out from a home overview, with tryout/clinic registration handed off to LeagueApps/Club Automation, prices and cart/checkout present — a registration engine with inventory, not a single conversion page.

mapped.observed_as: Why the Right Club Fit Matters More Than the Team Number
Empowering The Mind Body & Soul of Champions (founder bios + mission)
Our Alumni and Commitments / All Commits and Alumni
Sponsor logo wall (JVA, Parkview Ortho, Truitt Law...)
Connect / Who we are / What we do / Training

unmapped.observed: Upcoming Clinics (dated session list: Boys All-Skills, Controlled Scrimmage, Setting & Defense — each with date + price + external Register)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A dated schedule of sessions each redirecting to external registration is a recurring pattern the canonical section list has no id for; closest results/useCases both miss the dated-schedule-with-redirect nature.

proposed_new.name: event-listings
proposed_new.evidence: Tryouts and clinics are dated sessions (July 23 boys tryout, dated Upcoming Clinics) whose Register/Learn-More CTAs hand off to LeagueApps external registration/ticketing — a dated schedule redirecting per-event, not a scheduling wizard.

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; nav, ctas, forms, commerce and proof all captured. Clear multi-page club with external registration and cart/checkout.

gap_findings: Registration/commerce runs entirely through 3rd-party LeagueApps/Club Automation with cart+checkout and per-session prices — the site's job is program registration with inventory, not a single conversion action, so it falls outside single-CTA ICP.
The dated tryout/clinic schedule → external-registration pattern needs an event-listings capability; the canonical section vocab lacks an id for a dated-session-with-redirect block.

Athlete college-commitment wall (~120 cards, filterable by category) is a proof-of-results archetype that maps only loosely to results/socialProof — a roster/outcome showcase distinct from testimonials or portfolio.
